content:
Personal information  Full name (in Vietnamese): Đặng Thanh Hưng Name (in publications): Thanh-Hung Dang Nationality: Vietnam Gender: Male  Research Interests  Computational Number Theory Cryptography Computer Arithmetic  Education  PhD in Mathematics (June 2016 - 2020)  Institution: Institute of Mathematics of Marseille (I2M), Aix-Marseille University, France. Supervisors: Alexis Bonnecaze and Stéphane Ballet. Thesis Title: Scalar complexity of Chudnovsky-type mutliplication algorithm in finite fields.   Master in Mathematics (Sep 2012 - June 2014)  Specialization: “Fundamental Mathematics and Information Protection” Institution: Institut Galilée, Université Sorbonne Paris Nord, France.   Bachelor in Mathematics (Sep 2002-June 2006)  Specialization: Algebra and Number Theory Institution: Department of Mathematics, Vinh University, Vietnam.    Employment  Lecturer (Oct 2008 - May 2016)
Falcuty of Informatics and Mathematics, Phuong Dong University, Hanoi, Vietnam.
title: About me
